name: Soft Linen Shirt
summary: A fixture-backed lightweight shirt used to demonstrate factual labeling and confidence-aware guidance.

provenance.normalizationState: Normalized from fixture fields into storefront shape
provenance.confidenceReason: Core product fields are present, but color-compatibility guidance remains heuristic and fixture-based.
provenance.confidenceImprovement: Confidence would improve with validated product imagery, richer attribute coverage, and real supporting catalog evidence.

recommendationRationale.objectiveMatch: The source color is warm ivory and the category is a lightweight shirt, which makes it easy to place in a neutral fixture wardrobe.
recommendationRationale.inferredMatch: Muted olive and clay pairings are suggested through simple fixture heuristics, not measured color analysis.
recommendationRationale.subjectiveSuggestion: This piece may suit a calm, polished outfit direction if you want a softer neutral base.

facts.label: Palette note
facts.value: Often pairs well with muted olive or clay tones

facts.label: Confidence note
facts.value: Color harmony guidance is medium confidence because it is fixture-based and not validated across real photography conditions

facts.label: Low confidence reason
facts.value: Not applicable for this product in the current fixture set

name: Rosewood Knit Layer
summary: A lower-confidence fixture item used to demonstrate cautious recommendation messaging.

provenance.normalizationState: Normalized from fixture fields into storefront shape with limited supporting evidence
provenance.confidenceReason: The shell has a clear source color and category, but lacks enough supporting evidence to make stronger cross-garment color claims.
provenance.confidenceImprovement: Confidence would improve with validated imagery, better color reference support, and more complete cross-item compatibility evidence.

recommendationRationale.objectiveMatch: The item is explicitly represented as a knit layer with a muted rosewood source color.
recommendationRationale.inferredMatch: Potential compatibility with soft olive and warm ivory is an explainable heuristic, but the evidence is limited.
recommendationRationale.subjectiveSuggestion: This could add warmth to a muted outfit, but the shell is intentionally cautious about framing it as a strong match.

facts.label: Palette note
facts.value: Potentially complements soft olive and warm ivory, but the pairing confidence is limited

facts.label: Confidence note
